prompt: A read-only Grill reaches an observable discussion checkpoint before handoff; the request grants no project-memory write authority.
must: give the goal, settled choices, open choice, key evidence, and continuation point in natural domain language
state once that this was not saved and may be lost across sessions
must_not: write docs/teamwork/discussion/ or imply canonical memory changed
claim this offline authored case proves live model behavior
evidence: Offline static discussion-contract fixture; it does not prove live model behavior.
